# init(test:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new test run for the provided test.

## Declaration

```swift
init(test: XCTest)
```

## Parameters

- **test**: An [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTest] instance.

## Return Value

A test run for the provided test.
